title: Workato Recipe
description: Represents a Workato recipe — an automated workflow connecting applications and services. Recipes consist of a trigger and one or more actions that run when the trigger fires.

id.description: Unique integer identifier of the recipe within the workspace.

name.description: Display name of the recipe shown in the Workato UI.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what the recipe does and when it runs.

folder_id.description: ID of the workspace folder that contains this recipe.

running.description: Whether the recipe is currently active and processing trigger events.

trigger_application.description: Name of the connector used for the recipe's trigger event.

action_applications.description: List of connector names used in the recipe's action steps.

code.description: JSON-encoded recipe definition containing trigger and action configurations.

config.description: JSON-encoded recipe configuration for connection mappings and settings.

stop_cause.description: Reason the recipe was last stopped (e.g., error, manual stop).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the recipe was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the recipe was last modified.

stopped_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the recipe was last stopped, if applicable.

last_run_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent recipe job execution.

job_succeeded_count.description: Total number of successfully completed jobs for this recipe.

job_failed_count.description: Total number of failed jobs for this recipe.

version_no.description: Current version number of the recipe.

RecipeVersion.title: Recipe Version
RecipeVersion.description: A specific version snapshot of a recipe, created each time the recipe is saved.

id.description: Unique identifier of this version record.

version_no.description: Sequential version number, incrementing with each save.

comment.description: Optional description of what changed in this version.

code.description: JSON-encoded recipe definition at this version.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this version was saved.

RecipeJob.title: Recipe Job
RecipeJob.description: A single execution instance of a recipe triggered by an event.

status.description: Current status of the job execution.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job started executing.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the job finished executing.

error.description: Error message if the job failed.
